Lesson_23_Parabola_Generator_1_0_0_Info.keywords: Parabola, Gradio, SQLite, LDD 2.0, Semantic Exoskeleton
Lesson_23_Parabola_Generator_1_0_0_Info.annotation: Educational application demonstrating parabola generation, persistence, and Agentic UX standards.

BusinessScenarios.Scenario: User -> Adjust Parameters & Generate -> Config Updated, Points Calculated, Points Saved to DB, Table Displayed
User -> Draw Graph -> Data Loaded from DB, Plotly Figure Generated and Displayed

load_config_METHOD.NAME: load_config
load_config_METHOD.annotation: Loads settings from JSON or returns defaults.

save_points_METHOD.NAME: save_points
save_points_METHOD.annotation: Transactional delete and insert of coordinates.

get_points_METHOD.NAME: get_points
get_points_METHOD.annotation: Retrieves all coordinates as a pandas DataFrame.

parabola_engine_py.annotation: Pure math logic for parabola calculation.

calculate_parabola_FUNC.NAME: calculate_parabola
calculate_parabola_FUNC.annotation: Calculates y = ax^2 + c for a given range.

app_logic_py.annotation: Orchestrates UI events and backend services.

handle_generate_data_FUNC.NAME: handle_generate_data
handle_generate_data_FUNC.annotation: Coordinates config save, calculation, and DB storage.

handle_draw_graph_FUNC.NAME: handle_draw_graph
handle_draw_graph_FUNC.annotation: Builds Plotly Figure from DB data.

run_lesson_23_py.annotation: Gradio UI launcher and main entry point.
